summary_en: TDK's subsidiary Amperex Technology acquires 100% of Linergy Power Sdn Bhd, a Malaysian lithium-ion battery manufacturer, for $241.1 million to strengthen mid-size battery supply capacity.
title_en: Notice Regarding Acquisition of Shares of Linergy Power Sdn Bhd by TDK Subsidiary (Full Subsidiary Status)
translation_en_brief:
On 19 May 2026, TDK Corporation's board resolved to have its secondary battery subsidiary Amperex Technology (Singapore) Pte. Ltd. acquire 100% of the shares of Linergy Power Sdn Bhd (Malaysia), making it a wholly owned subsidiary. TDK currently holds 25.5% of Linergy indirectly. The transaction value is approximately $241.1 million (including $240 million for equity and $1.1 million in advisory fees).

Linergy Power manufactures lithium-ion batteries and was established in December 2024. The company reported FY2026 assets of $380 million but remains unprofitable, with operating losses of approximately $22.7 million. TDK justifies the acquisition as strategic to its energy application products division, enabling enhanced supply flexibility for mid-size battery products and better serving diverse global customer needs aligned with its long-term "TDK Transformation" vision announced in May 2024.
